componentDescription: A navigation component that displays a horizontal or vertical list of menus and their items.

items.description: An array of menu items to be rendered. Each item follows the 'MenubarItem' type definition.

orientation.description: Specifies the layout orientation of the menubar, either horizontal or vertical. Defaults to horizontal if not provided.

size.description: Determines the predefined size of the menubar, affecting its dimensions and internal spacing.

variant.description: Defines the visual style or variant of the menubar, such as 'primary', 'secondary', etc.

defaultActiveMenuId.description: The ID of the menu item that is active by default.

defaultOpenMenuId.description: The ID of the menu that is open by default.

views.description: Provides custom styling for various parts of the menubar, allowing for granular visual customization.
